sections.title: Before Making History or after The Enchanted Key

lines.speaker: Silver merchant
lines.text: Silver! Silver! Best prices for buying and selling in all Kandarin!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Silver merchant
lines.text: Hello, I hope Jorral was pleased with that Journal.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sure it's been a valuable find.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What I came to ask was: I lost that key you gave me.

lines.speaker: Silver merchant
lines.text: Oh dear, luckily I found it, but it'll cost you 500gp as I know it's valuable.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Silver merchant
lines.text: You don't have enough money, sorry.

lines.speaker: Silver merchant
lines.text: You don't have the space to carry it! Empty some space in your inventory.

lines.speaker: Silver merchant
lines.text: Thank you, enjoy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Silver merchant
lines.text: You know you can use that enchanted key you have on your keyring all over Gielinor. Who knows what you might find?

lines.speaker: Silver merchant
lines.text: You know you can use that enchanted key you've got stored? You can use it all over Gielinor. Who knows what you might find?

lines.speaker: Silver merchant
lines.text: You know you can use that enchanted key you have all over Gielinor. Who knows what you might find?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, You know that key you gave me?

lines.speaker: Silver merchant
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It dissolved!

lines.speaker: Silver merchant
lines.text: Really? I suppose it served its purpose.
